title: Living in Bouler Vlog 6 - 27 - 2017: Buildings of Rome Book

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his June 27 2017 day in Boulder, focused on editing a book about the Buildings of Rome by chopping out what he finds to be an excessive number of parenthetical references to make it read as a cohesive whole. He also describes using a text-to-speech feature on his phone to consume pages, and watching a TV show (likely Fargo) partway through its second season on Netflix.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.topic: Buildings of Rome book's writing style
stances.position: finds the excessive parenthetical references annoying and distracting, editing them out for cohesion
considers it the most challenging book project he has tackled so far

entities: Fargo (TV show, inferred from 'second season' context)
